# GET /v1/appInfos/{id}/relationships/primarySubcategoryOne | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ App Store Connect API ](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi)

- [ GET /v1/appInfos/{id}/relationships/primarySubcategoryOne ](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/get-v1-appinfos-_id_-relationships-primarysubcategoryone)

-  GET /v1/appInfos/{id}/relationships/primarySubcategoryOne 

Web Service Endpoint# GET /v1/appInfos/{id}/relationships/primarySubcategoryOne

App Store Connect API 3.6+## [URL](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/get-v1-appinfos-_id_-relationships-primarysubcategoryone#url)



```
GET https://api.appstoreconnect.apple.com/v1/appInfos/{id}/relationships/primarySubcategoryOne
```

## [Path Parameters](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/get-v1-appinfos-_id_-relationships-primarysubcategoryone#path-parameters)

`id``string` (Required) 

## [Response Codes](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/get-v1-appinfos-_id_-relationships-primarysubcategoryone#response-codes)

` 200 OK``[AppInfoPrimarySubcategoryOneLinkageResponse`](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/appinfoprimarysubcategoryonelinkageresponse)`OK`

 Content-Type: application/json ` 400 Bad Request``[ErrorResponse`](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/errorresponse)`Bad Request`

 Content-Type: application/json ` 401 Unauthorized``[ErrorResponse`](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/errorresponse)`Unauthorized`

 Content-Type: application/json ` 403 Forbidden``[ErrorResponse`](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/errorresponse)`Forbidden`

 Content-Type: application/json ` 404 Not Found``[ErrorResponse`](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/errorresponse)`Not Found`

 Content-Type: application/json ` 429 ``[ErrorResponse`](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/errorresponse)``

 Content-Type: application/json ## [See Also](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/get-v1-appinfos-_id_-relationships-primarysubcategoryone#see-also)

### [Reading Subcategories](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/get-v1-appinfos-_id_-relationships-primarysubcategoryone#Reading-Subcategories)

[`Read the Primary Subcategory One Information of an App Info`](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/get-v1-appinfos-_id_-primarysubcategoryone)Get the first App Store subcategory within an app’s primary category.[`Read the Primary Subcategory Two Information of an App Info`](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/get-v1-appinfos-_id_-primarysubcategorytwo)Get the second App Store subcategory within an app’s primary category.[`Read the Secondary Subcategory One Information of an App Info`](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/get-v1-appinfos-_id_-secondarysubcategoryone)Get the first App Store subcategory within an app’s secondary category.[`Read the Secondary Subcategory Two Information of an App Info`](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/get-v1-appinfos-_id_-secondarysubcategorytwo)Get the second App Store subcategory within an app’s secondary category.[`GET /v1/appInfos/{id}/relationships/primarySubcategoryTwo`](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/get-v1-appinfos-_id_-relationships-primarysubcategorytwo)[`GET /v1/appInfos/{id}/relationships/secondarySubcategoryOne`](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/get-v1-appinfos-_id_-relationships-secondarysubcategoryone)[`GET /v1/appInfos/{id}/relationships/secondarySubcategoryTwo`](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/get-v1-appinfos-_id_-relationships-secondarysubcategorytwo)
